ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "investment_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., Oil, Gold, Company Stocks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the investment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the investment type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the investment (e.g., commodity, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Return value for the investment type on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the return entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the return entry */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the investment on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the return data (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
